items.title: Wrexham duo warns fans: No idea how it will go
items.summary: Wrexham's celebrity owners are swapping the boardroom for the commentary booth to mark five years since their game-changing takeover of the Welsh club.

items.title: Tudor to Spurs players: You can cry or you can fight
items.summary: Under-fire Igor Tudor has told Tottenham players to not be "victims" and to ignore the "b-------" in a desperate bid to rally his low-on-confidence squad for Sunday's trip to Liverpool.

items.title: Chelsea captain James signs new six-year contract
items.summary: Reece James has signed a new six-year contract with Chelsea that will keep him at Stamford Bridge until 2032, the club have announced.

items.title: Thomas Partey to deny two new allegations of rape
items.summary: Former Arsenal footballer Thomas Partey is set to deny two new allegations of rape, a court has heard, as the midfielder was absent from the dock for the first hearing.

items.title: Van Persie: 'Lijkt soms net of ik m'n hoofd in een vuilnisbak steek op Instagram'
items.summary: Feyenoord-trainer Robin van Persie krijgt de laatste maanden bakken met kritiek over zich heen, óók op sociale media. Tijdens de persconferentie in aanloop naar de stadsderby met Excelsior ging de Rotterdamse oefenmeester daar dieper op in. Van Persie gaf aan de meeste kritiek niet mee te krijgen, maar soms wel het idee te hebben dat hij zijn hoofd in een vuilnisbak steekt als hij op Instagram loopt te scrollen.

items.title: Spurs ‘can cry or fight’, says embattled Tudor; Guardiola wins first monthly award since 2021 – football live
items.summary: ⚽ All the latest football news and buildup ⚽ Ten things to look out for | Read Football Daily | Mail Taha Apart from the weather forecast, here’s a match-by-match guide of other things to look out for in the Premier League this weekend. “Erling Haaland’s first competitive outing in English football came at the London Stadium. He ran riot that day, scoring twice as Manchester City opened the 2022-23 season with victory over West Ham, and this venue has been a happy hunting ground for Haaland ever since. He found the net in another win in September 2023 and bagged a hat-trick there last season, but he is in patchy form before City visit West Ham for a must-win game on Saturday night.” Continue reading...

items.title: Slot: Reds ' title defence has been a struggle, but best is yet to come
items.summary: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot insists the future for the Premier League champions still looks bright despite their disappointing title defence.

items.title: Cynische Guardiola: 'We waren toch de beste competitie?'
items.summary: Pep Guardiola vindt dat er te snel wordt geoordeeld over de kracht van de Premier League. Na een teleurstellende Europese week voor Engelse clubs kreeg de Manchester City-manager tijdens zijn persmoment vragen over de tegenvallende resultaten in de Champions League.

items.title: Too good to go down? Ranking shock Premier League relegations
items.summary: Premier League champions, FA Cup winners and club legends have all suffered the unwanted fate, but which relegated side really was "too good to go down"?

items.title: Van Persie komt terug op eigen analyse: 'Daar hadden jullie gelijk in'
items.summary: Robin van Persie kwam vrijdag terug op zijn analyse van Feyenoord na de wedstrijd tegen NAC. De trainer van de Rotterdammers clashte met journalisten over of zijn ploeg nu wel of niet goed had gespeeld. Op de persconferentie in aanloop naar het competitieduel met Sparta, zette Van Persie het een en ander recht. 'Daar had ik scherper in moeten zijn.'

items.title: Ten Hag veroordeeld tot Van den Brom? ‘Anders is hij eigenwijs’
items.summary: FC Twente en John van den Brom willen met elkaar door, zo liet de club uit Enschede afgelopen week weten . Van den Brom nam dit seizoen het roer over van de ontslagen Joseph Oosting. Verslaggevers Geert-Jan Jakobs en Martijn Krabbendam praten in Rondje Europa over de trainer van FC Twente.

items.title: Hoefkens: 'Ik leefde met Van Persie mee'
items.summary: Carl Hoefkens heeft afgelopen week van de eerste rij gekeken naar alle kritiek die collega Robin van Persie moest incasseren. De trainer van NAC Breda sprong vrijdagmiddag in de bres voor de coach van Feyenoord.

items.title: Arsenal open contract talks with Rice
items.summary: Arsenal begin talks with England midfielder Declan Rice over a new long-term contract.

items.title: Tottenham players can either 'cry or fight' - Tudor
items.summary: Tottenham interim boss Igor Tudor says his players can "cry or fight" as they seek to avoid relegation from the Premier League.

items.title: Six Nations braced for 'Super Saturday' like no other
items.summary: The 2026 Six Nations has kept everyone guessing, ripping up pre‑tournament scripts and making anyone who dared to predict anything look foolish. One final instalment awaits on a decisive ‘Super Saturday’, where history can be made…

items.title: How will Kinsky, Tottenham move on from fiasco at Atlético? It won't be easy
items.summary: ESPN FC analyst and former Man City defender Nedum Onuoha reflects on how Spurs' loss in Madrid was a cruel reminder of the savage nature of football.

items.title: Jason Tindall - the most misunderstood man in football?
items.summary: Newcastle United assistant Jason Tindall has stood alongside head coach Eddie Howe for the best part of two decades and is more than a wind-up merchant.

items.title: Röhl: Rangers ready for nine cup finals in title race
items.summary: Rangers head coach Danny Röhl understands "it's all about winning" as his side face "nine cup finals" in the Scottish Premiership title race - ahead of Sunday's visit to St Mirren live on Sky Sports.

items.title: Fleetwood admits return of family to England from Dubai is 'a relief'
items.summary: Ryder Cup star Tommy Fleetwood has spoken of his relief after his family were able to return to England from Dubai amid the Middle East conflict.

items.title: Matildas survive North Korea scare to book spot in Women’s Asian Cup semi-final
items.summary: Australia win 2-1 over Korea DPR in nervous tussle in Perth Goals from Kennedy and Kerr secure 2027 World Cup qualification The Matildas have avoided an early exit from their home Women’s Asian Cup and qualified for their ninth straight Women’s World Cup after a nervous 2-1 win over North Korea at Perth Rectangular Stadium on Friday night. An early goal to midfielder Alanna Kennedy was doubled by a Sam Kerr screamer early in the second half, though a relentless North Korea side – who clawed a goal back in the 64th minute and registered almost five times as many shots over the course of the game – did not make it easy. Continue reading...

items.title: What's next in twisting-and-turning Scottish title race?
items.summary: Following a fortnight off, what's the state of play in a captivating Scottish title fight as another blockbuster weekend looms?

items.title: NWSL 2026 predictions: Denver’s debut, Hutton’s big move, and can anyone stop Chawinga?
items.summary: The 2026 NWSL season kicks off on Friday. Our writers discuss the teams, players and story lines they’re watching this year How the High Impact Player (HIP) rule evolves the NWSL’s place in the global transfer market. The league has regained some control of the “is the NWSL still the best league in the world” narrative, keeping Trinity Rodman on a deal via this new mechanism. The next transfer window or two will be a fascinating test of the league’s willingness to ease restrictions and let its teams reach as far as they’d like. JR Continue reading...

items.title: Will Iran play at the 2026 World Cup? Explaining the state of play
items.summary: The United States’ and Israel’s war with Iran has implications in the sports world, with a war of words involving Fifa leaving the team’s status unclear Iran’s participation in this summer’s World Cup appears to change on an almost hourly basis. US president Donald Trump caused more confusion on Thursday by saying he did not believe it “is appropriate that they be there, for their own life and safety”. The incendiary post on Truth Social came less than 48 hours after Fifa’s president, Gianni Infantino, said Trump had told him in a meeting at the White House on Tuesday evening that Iran would be “welcome” at the World Cup. Hours later, Iran’s football federation posted its response on Instagram, stating: “No one can exclude Iran’s national team from the World Cup” and going on to say that the US should be removed as host due to Trump’s implicit threat. Continue reading...

items.title: Another centimetre! Duplantis sets 15th pole vault world record
items.summary: Pole vaulter Mondo Duplantis added another centimetre to his world record after he cleared 6.31 metres in Sweden on Thursday.

items.title: Meesterwerk Vanderbiest? KV Mechelen-trainer reageert op stelling Degryse en scepsis analisten
items.summary: Staat Fred Vanderbiest op het punt om zijn 'meesterwerk' af te ronden? Marc Degryse haalde eerder die term boven, omdat hij vindt dat de kern van KVM kwalitatief niet goed genoeg is voor de top zes. Hij is overigens niet de enige analist die zich de afgelopen weken nog altijd sceptisch toonde.

items.title: Wie is Andreas Patz, de nieuwe T2 van RSC Anderlecht?
items.summary: Anderlecht heeft deze vrijdag de aanstelling van Jérémy Taravel als T1 officieel gemaakt, maar kondigde ook aan dat een nieuwe assistent, Andreas Patz, volgende dinsdag aan zijn avontuur bij de Brusselse club begint. Maar wie is die 42-jarige Duitse coach eigenlijk?

items.title: "Je ne savais même pas" : Vincent Kompany réagit à la vidéo virale sur son "aura"
items.summary: Vincent Kompany fait actuellement parler de lui sur les réseaux sociaux pour son "aura". Le tacticien belge a réagi à cette tendance en conférence de presse.

items.title: Bryan Heynen en El Ouahdi laten weinig twijfel bestaan voor Limburgse derby
items.summary: Na de Europese zege tegen Freiburg schakelt Racing Genk meteen door naar de derby tegen STVV. In Limburg stijgt de spanning, terwijl Bryan Heynen en Zakaria El Ouahdi allebei duidelijke taal spreken.

items.title: Qui est Andreas Patz, le nouvel adjoint du Sporting d'Anderlecht ?
items.summary: Anderlecht a officialisé ce vendredi la nomination de Jérémy Taravel en tant que T1, mais a également annoncé qu'un nouvel adjoint, Andreas Patz, va débuter mardi prochain son aventure avec le club bruxellois. Mais alors, qui est ce coach allemand de 42 ans ?

items.title: KRC Genk of STVV? Frank Boeckx schuift duidelijke favoriet naar voor met oog op Limburgse derby
items.summary: De Limburgse derby van zondag leeft meer dan ooit. Volgens Frank Boeckx zijn de rollen tussen KRC Genk en STVV zelfs helemaal omgekeerd, met de Truienaars als verrassende favoriet.
